moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in their final week, with the men's and women's singles finals set to take place this coming weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Centre Court drama is heating up! Who are you backing for the Wimbledon titles this weekend? The tension is building!

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Wimbledon white, strawberries and cream. The iconic tournament is reaching its climax – who will lift the trophies?

moments.title: Tour de France in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The 2026 Tour de France, which began on July 4th, is currently underway, with cyclists battling through the early stages of the prestigious race.

angles.name: Following the Peloton
angles.copy: The peloton is powering through France! Are you following the Tour de France action this year?

angles.name: Early Stages Drama
angles.copy: Early stages of the Tour de France, but already plenty of drama. Who's your pick to wear the yellow jersey in Paris?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is set to host TRNSMT Festival from July 10-12, bringing a massive lineup of artists to Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Takeover
angles.copy: TRNSMT is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend! Who are you buzzing to see live?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Festival vibes incoming! TRNSMT kicks off Friday – get ready for a massive weekend of live music!

moments.title: Wireless Festival in London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival brings huge hip-hop and R&B acts to Finsbury Park, London from July 12-14.

angles.name: Finsbury Park Set to Explode
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is back in London this weekend! Finsbury Park is about to get lit with the biggest names in urban music.

angles.name: Who's Heading to Wireless?
angles.copy: Who's heading to Wireless? Get ready for three days of non-stop bangers and incredible live performances!

moments.title: The Open Championship Nears
moments.blurb: Golf's oldest major, The Open Championship, is just over a week away, with practice days starting July 12th at Royal Birkdale, and tournament play July 16-19.

angles.name: Claret Jug Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale! Who's your favourite to lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Major Golf Returns
angles.copy: Major golf is back next week! Get ready for The Open Championship – a truly historic event at Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: Love Island Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK continues nightly, with new islanders and fresh drama unfolding in the villa.

angles.name: Bombshell Alert
angles.copy: Another night, another bombshell! What's been your favourite Love Island moment this week?

angles.name: Villa Heating Up
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! Who's coupling up and who's heading home tonight?

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, July 7th.

angles.name: Iconic Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr today!

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday Beck
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning alternative artist Beck turns 56 tomorrow, July 8th.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, it's Beck's 56th birthday! What's your go-to track from the genre-bending legend?

angles.name: Happy Almost Birthday
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to Beck! Celebrate the alternative icon turning 56 tomorrow with your favourite tune.

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love turns 62 on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd birthday to the incomparable Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Crank Up Hole
angles.copy: Rock royalty alert! Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday this week – crank up some Hole!

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: Pop star and entrepreneur Jessica Simpson turns 46 on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the one and only Jessica Simpson on Friday! Which of her hits is your favourite?

angles.name: Remember This Hit?
angles.copy: Remember this pop queen? Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday this week – what's your top track?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Timeless Songs
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega on Saturday! What's your favourite of her timeless songs?

angles.name: Luka in the Neighbourhood
angles.copy: Luka, in the neighbourhood... Wishing a very happy birthday to Suzanne Vega this weekend!

moments.title: Happy 80th Birthday Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: Rock & Country Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt next Wednesday! What's your favourite song from the rock and country legend?

angles.name: Powerful Vocals
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt next week! Which of her powerful vocals stands out to you?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are breaking up for the summer holidays this week and next, marking the start of the summer break.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially starting for many! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Holiday Plans
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're heading off on holiday, where are you going?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for this week (dated July 4th-10th) is out, revealing the nation's most popular tracks.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is here! Have your favourite tracks made it into the Top 40 this week?

angles.name: What's On Repeat?
